advert.brand: Smart energy smart meters by Smart energy gb
advert.description: The brand logo and slogan 'get a smart meter' are clearly visible on the screen at the 00:54 mark.
The tagline 'FOR 7 SYMPTOMS THINK GAVISCON' and product packaging appear prominently as the final shot of the advertisement at 01:14.
The full company name 'TRAILFINDERS THE TRAVEL EXPERTS', phone number, and website are displayed on screen as the closing graphic at 01:44.
The final frame at 02:13 displays the 'itv WIN' logo surrounded by polaroids of past winners against a blue background.
The Poundland logo and slogan 'pound shopping' appear on screen alongside the man rolling in the giant coin at 02:44.

advert.brand: Consorzio grana padano cheese by Consorzio tutela gra
advert.description: A close-up of the 'Consorzio Grana Padano' logo on the cheese wheel is shown as the very last image of this short ad.
The advertisement concludes with a shot of the food preparation scene featuring the Bisto box and Paxo eggs at 03:14.
